project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring precise jump timing, tallest cactus variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0 (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: High difficulty obstacle appearing from game start, requires precise jump at peak height (90px), 25% spawn probability

visual_specification.shape: Three desert cacti grouped together with varying heights, vertical trunks with spikes
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients
visual_specification.details: Three cacti with varying heights creating irregular top silhouette, all with visible spikes/thorns, widest and tallest obstacle, requires player max jump height (90px) leaving only 10px clearance, hitbox 99x97px (3px margin for forgiveness)

relationships.shared_with: Same color and style as all obstacles
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34x70px (1 cactus), cactus_medium is 68x70px (2 cacti), cactus_large is tallest at 100px requiring precise timing

explicit_negations: no animation or movement (position changes only)
no spacing between the three cacti (grouped as single obstacle)
no uniform height (cacti should vary in height)
